ssorInheritance We would like to an accessor to be able to 'extend' another accessor (inherit some of its functionality). This would mean would have the same inputs and outputs, be able to add to them, access fields, and override methods. An accessor

, access fields, and override methods. An accessor is defined in JavaScript. Thus an implementation of inheritance would utilize JavaScript programming concepts. A few suggested approaches are listed below: Requiring a CommonJS module Constructor fun
